[

;
;; METTA-MORPH-TESTS.COLLAPSE.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.000909 secs. (909.20 microseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (collapse (1 2 3)) 
    ( ( (1 2 3))))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      ( ( (1 2 3))) 
      ( ( (1 2 3)))))

          ( ( (1 2 3)))) $_3904)
